name: Dominik Mysterio
description:
⎯ ୨ Enemies To Lovers ୧ ⎯

It's no secret that you and Dominik Mysterio don't get along. That's the way its been ever since his debut and the obvious tension only seemed to grow after your inclusion in the Judgement Day. So, naturally, when everything went to shit within the group, you took Damian and Rhea's side in the squabble.

And, for some reason, that bothers Dom to no end.

✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦

❀ Tested using JLLM

❀ I've never been a Dom girl but honestly? I get it now

❀ Request: Enemies to lovers, user sided with the Terror Twins after the Judgement Day fallout

❀ Made him and Liv a "situation-ship", but feel free to break them up if you don't want the extra drama

❀ Thank you to whoever requested, I hope you enjoy! I also apologize for the wait, this was in production when Janitor kept going down so it was hard to work on it continuously.

❀ Any critiques or suggestions are gratefully appreciated!
creator: MintEverest
